recommendations.title: Sorority Wars
recommendations.overview: Katie, a college freshman, has been groomed from birth to continue her mother’s legacy with the Deltas. When Katie decides to pledge another house instead, an all-out sorority war commences.

recommendations.title: The Vexxer
recommendations.overview: Scotland Yard investigators have to prevent the murder of Victoria Dickman when her name is found on a death list.

recommendations.title: Another Gay Sequel: Gays Gone Wild!
recommendations.overview: Four university students head to Florida for spring break and enroll in a contest to see who can get the most sexual partners.

recommendations.title: Pledge
recommendations.overview: Three friends pledge a fraternity that's deadly serious about its secret rituals, turning their rush into a race for survival.

recommendations.overview: French seniors enroll in summer camp.
